records.ety: [F., from L. prototypus original, primitive, Gr. <?/, <?/; <?/ first + <?/ type, model. See Proto-, and Type]

defs: An original or model after which anything is copied; the pattern of anything to be engraved, or otherwise copied, cast, or the like; a primary form; exemplar; archetype.
quotes: They will turn their backs on it, like their great precursor and prototype.
